name: Kimi K3
summary: Use a 2.8T multimodal coding model today through Kimi.com, Kimi Work, Kimi Code, or the API. It has a 1M-token context window, with downloadable weights promised by July 27.

name: Gemini Notebook
summary: Analyze notebooks grounded in your sources with a secure cloud computer that can write and run code. It is live for AI Ultra and eligible Workspace users, with Pro web access rolling out soon.

name: Gemini Omni in Vids
summary: Create short videos that can include your own verified avatar, reference images, background swaps, and lighting fixes. It is available in Vids for Google AI Pro, Ultra, and eligible Workspace users.

name: Inkling
summary: Fine-tune or download a 975B open-weight multimodal model with a lighter Inkling-Small preview for cheaper experiments. Tinker handles customization when local hardware is unrealistic.

name: GPT-5.6
summary: Build with Sol, Terra, or Luna in ChatGPT, Codex, and the API. Lower-cost tiers make agentic app builds and long Codex runs more affordable, while ChatGPT Work carries projects across files and apps.

name: Muse Spark 1.1
summary: Build coding, computer-use, and visual-to-code agents against Meta's public Model API preview. It can use tools, MCP servers, subagents, and a 1M-token context window.

name: GPT-Live
summary: Talk through ideas, support flows, or language practice in a more natural ChatGPT Voice. It listens and speaks at the same time, with Free through Pro rollout live and API access planned.

name: Claude Cowork on web & mobile
summary: Start a background Claude task on web or mobile, then let it keep running in Anthropic's cloud while your laptop is closed. Beta starts with Max users, with more plans to follow.
